prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A clean, sophisticated isometric 3D vector illustration in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A horizontal timeline flowing left to right, showing the evolution of the Translation Layer over one year. THREE MILESTONE POINTS: POINT 1 'TODAY' (Blue #6C82FE): An isometric smartphone showing a simple filter interface. Below it, a small funnel icon with '20→8→4' numbers. A label: 'v1: No fluffy only'. Below: 'Dial: SUGGEST'. The funnel is wide at top, narrow at bottom — heavy human filtering needed. A matte black silhouette figure is actively swiping cards. POINT 2 '4 MONTHS' (Orange #F59400): A smartphone showing a refined filter. Funnel icon with '20→3' — much more efficient. Label: 'v2: + sole color + pattern + logo + laces'. Below: 'Dial: CONFIRM'. The silhouette figure only needs to approve. POINT 3 '1 YEAR' (Pink #FC6978): A smartphone showing a proactive notification. No funnel needed — instead, a single shoe card with a checkmark appears automatically. Label: 'v3: + brand preference + size growth + season'. Below: 'Dial: NOTIFY/CONFIRM'. The silhouette figure is relaxed, just reviewing. BOTTOM: A constant Blue #6C82FE thin solid horizontal line: 'Explicit Dial — Purchase always requires Confirm'. This line never rises. Above it, an ascending curve in Orange showing the Implicit Dial rising over time. Connecting lines between the three points show progression. All: clean uniform-weight matte black #111111 outlines. Soft-cell shading. Light Gray #EEEEEE background. Generous whitespace.
negative_prompt: realistic rendering, photorealistic, gradients, textured outlines, decorative objects, dark background, cluttered, shadows on background, 3D photorealism, realistic people, actual graph software, Excel charts
